features.name: $sformat with runtime variable format string
features.description: Code should include a $sformat call where the format string argument is a variable (not a string literal), requiring runtime evaluation of the format pattern

features.name: dynamic format string construction with $sformat
features.description: Code should include using $sformat to dynamically build a format string at runtime, where the constructed format string is then used as the format argument in another $sformat call

features.name: string concatenation in $sformat arguments
features.description: Code should include string concatenation using array concatenation syntax applied to string operands as an argument to $sformat
